ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biological sample */,
  "organism" TEXT /* The organism from which the sample is taken */,
  "organism_part" TEXT /* The specific part of the organism from which the sample is taken */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the organism at the time of sampling */,
  "developmental_stage" TEXT /* Developmental stage of the organism */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the organism */,
  "ancestry_category" TEXT /* Ancestry category of the organism */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cell in the sample */,
  "cell_line" TEXT /* Cell line identifier, if applicable */,
  "disease" TEXT /* Disease or condition associated with the sample */,
  "individual" TEXT /* Individual identifier for the organism */,
  "biological_replicate" INTEGER /* Biological replicate number */,
  "sample_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "sample_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "sample_preparation_method" TEXT /* Method used to prepare the sample */,
  "sample_quality_control" TEXT /* Quality control measures taken for the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the biological sample used in the experiment */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material used in the experiment (e.g., tissue, cell line) */,
  "assay_name" TEXT /* Name of the assay or experiment */,
  "technology_type" TEXT /* Technology or method used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that generated the file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file */,
  "file_uri" TEXT /* URI or URL where the data file can be accessed */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data file in bytes */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the data file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access granted (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "access_granted_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who granted access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data file whose version is being tracked */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the data version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrumentation" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., mass spectrometer, chromatograph) */,
  "instrument_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_experiments" (
  "instrument_experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument-experiment relationship */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that used the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_experiments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_experiments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instrumentation ("instrument_id")
)
